phrases.intent_en: Ask what the current featured exhibitions are
phrases.text_local: Quelles sont les expositions temporaires en ce moment ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel son lay ex-po-zee-SYON tahm-po-RAIR ahn suh mo-MAH
phrases.cultural_note: The Musée de la Civilisation is one of Canada's top museums with creative, thought-provoking exhibitions on society, culture, and history.

responses.english: It is posted at the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a permanent exhibit on First Nations
phrases.text_local: Y'a-tu une exposition permanente sur les Premières Nations ?
phrases.pronunciation: yah-TOO OON ex-po-zee-SYON pair-mah-NAHT soor lay pruh-MYAIR nah-SYON
phrases.cultural_note: The museum's 'This Is Our Story' exhibit is one of the most important Indigenous permanent exhibitions in Canada, presented in partnership with 11 First Nations.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the sunken ship visible through the floor
phrases.text_local: L'épave qu'on peut voir sous le plancher, c'est quoi exactement ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay-PAHV kon puh VWAHR soo luh plahn-SHAY say KWAH ex-ak-tuh-MAH
phrases.cultural_note: A 17th-century merchant ship (La Dauphine) was discovered during construction and is now visible through a glass floor in the entrance hall — stunning.

responses.english: It is on the ground floor, in the first room.
responses.phonetic: say toh ray-duh-shoh-SAY dahn lah pruh-MYAIR SAHL
responses.french: C'est au rez-de-chaussée, dans la première salle.

phrases.text_local: Est-ce que vous avez un tarif famille ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess-KUH voo zah-VAY un tah-REEF fah-MEE
phrases.cultural_note: The museum offers family pricing. Children under 12 are free. The building itself is a masterpiece of modern architecture by Moshe Safdie.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photography is allowed in exhibits
phrases.text_local: On peut prendre des photos dans les salles d'exposition ?
phrases.pronunciation: on puh PRAHN-druh day fo-TOH dahn lay SAHL dex-po-zee-SYON
phrases.cultural_note: Photography policies vary by exhibition. Personal non-flash photography is usually permitted in permanent galleries but may be restricted in temporary shows.
